relative abundance of each regulator

Two transcriptional regulators control the amount of transcription of gene X
Protein A is an activator, and is 25 times more abundant than protein R,
which is a repressor
The two proteins have independent, non-overlapping binding sites
Protein R has a 40-fold higher affinity for its binding site in the promoter
for gene X than protein A has for its binding site
Will transcription of gene X be activated or repressed?
